records.question: Which conferences have the homepage exactly http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/ipsen/index.html?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
WHERE conference.homepage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/ipsen/index.html'
records.pred_sql: SELECT Conference.Id FROM Conference WHERE Conference.HomePage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/ipsen/index.html'

records.question: Which conferences with homepage http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/finanz/index.html have papers published in 1980 or earlier?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
WHERE paper.year <= 1980 AND conference.homepage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/finanz/index.html'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Conference.Id = Paper.ConferenceId
WHERE Conference.HomePage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/finanz/index.html' 
AND Paper.Year <= 1980

records.question: What conferences named MODELS have the homepage http://www.ai.soc.i.kyoto-u.ac.jp/docmas/workshop/docm3as/ and feature papers published in the Lecture Notes in Computer Science journal with shortname LNCS and homepage http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE conference.homepage = 'http://www.ai.soc.i.kyoto-u.ac.jp/docmas/workshop/docm3as/' AND journal.fullname = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science' AND conference.shortname = 'MODELS' AND journal.shortname = 'LNCS' AND journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Conference.Id 
FROM Conference 
JOIN Paper ON Conference.Id = Paper.ConferenceId 
JOIN Journal ON Paper.JournalId = Journal.Id 
WHERE Conference.FullName = 'MODELS' 
AND Conference.HomePage = 'http://www.ai.soc.i.kyoto-u.ac.jp/docmas/workshop/docm3as/' 
AND Journal.ShortName = 'LNCS' 
AND Journal.HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname ITW have papers published in journals?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE conference.shortname = 'ITW'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Conference.Id = Paper.ConferenceId
WHERE Conference.ShortName = 'ITW' AND Paper.JournalId IS NOT NULL

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname IPCO and homepage http://ipco.epfl.ch/ have papers published in 2011 or later in the journal Lecture Notes in Computer Science, where the journal’s shortname is LNCS and its homepage is http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?

SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE paper.year >= 2011 AND conference.homepage = 'http://ipco.epfl.ch/' AND journal.shortname = 'LNCS' AND journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/' AND journal.fullname = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science' AND conference.shortname = 'IPCO'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Conference.Id = Paper.ConferenceId
JOIN Journal ON Paper.JournalId = Journal.Id
WHERE Conference.ShortName = 'IPCO'
  AND Conference.HomePage = 'http://ipco.epfl.ch/'
  AND Paper.Year >= 2011
  AND Journal.ShortName = 'LNCS'
  AND Journal.HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname NCM and homepage http://www.aicit.org/ncm/ had papers published exactly in 2009?

records.question: Which conferences with the shortname DCC and homepage exactly http://www.cs.brandeis.edu/~dcc/Call.html have papers published in 1999 or later in the journal IEEE Transactions on Information Theory, where the journal’s shortname is TIT and its homepage is exactly http://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=18?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE paper.year >= 1999 AND journal.fullname = 'IEEE Transactions on Information Theory' AND conference.shortname = 'DCC' AND journal.shortname = 'TIT' AND conference.homepage = 'http://www.cs.brandeis.edu/~dcc/Call.html' AND journal.homepage = 'http://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=18'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Conference.Id = Paper.ConferenceId
JOIN Journal ON Paper.JournalId = Journal.Id
WHERE Conference.ShortName = 'DCC'
  AND Conference.HomePage = 'http://www.cs.brandeis.edu/~dcc/Call.html'
  AND Paper.Year >= 1999
  AND Journal.ShortName = 'TIT'
  AND Journal.HomePage = 'http://ieeexplore.ieee.org/xpl/RecentIssue.jsp?punumber=18'

records.question: Which conferences named CHARME with homepage http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/charme/index.html have papers published at most in 2001 in the journal Lecture Notes in Computer Science with homepage http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT conference.id FROM conference
JOIN paper ON conference.id = paper.conferenceid
JOIN journal ON paper.journalid = journal.id
WHERE paper.year <= 2001 AND conference.shortname = 'CHARME' AND conference.homepage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/charme/index.html' AND journal.fullname = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science' AND journal.homepage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT Conference.Id
FROM Conference
JOIN Paper ON Conference.Id = Paper.ConferenceId
JOIN Journal ON Paper.JournalId = Journal.Id
WHERE Conference.FullName = 'CHARME' 
  AND Conference.HomePage = 'http://www.informatik.uni-trier.de/~ley/db/conf/charme/index.html'
  AND Journal.FullName = 'Lecture Notes in Computer Science' 
  AND Journal.HomePage = 'http://www.springerlink.com/content/105633/'
  AND Paper.Year <= 2001
GROUP BY Conference.Id
HAVING COUNT(Paper.Id) > 0
